title: Business Roles
subtitle: Named roles that can be assigned to users as owners of various objects.

permissions.deniedView: You do not have permission to view business roles.
permissions.deniedCreate: You do not have permission to create business roles.
permissions.deniedEdit: You do not have permission to edit business roles.
permissions.deniedDelete: You do not have permission to delete business roles.

messages.deletedSuccess: The business role was successfully deleted.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Business Role?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. Existing owner assignments using this role may become orphaned.

emptyState.title: No business roles defined yet
emptyState.description: Create your first business role (e.g., Data Owner, Domain Owner).
